gcp.accessapproval.organizations.getAcce.description: Gets the Access Approval settings associated with a project, folder, or organization.

required.description: The name of the AccessApprovalSettings to retrieve. Format: "{projects|folders|organizations}/{id}/accessApprovalSetting

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.updateA.description: Updates the settings associated with a project, folder, or organization. Settings to update are determined by the value of field_mask.

required.description: The resource name of the settings. Format is one of: * "projects/{project}/accessApprovalSettings" * "folders/{folder}/a

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.getServ.description: Retrieves the service account that is used by Access Approval to access KMS keys for signing approved approval requests.

required.description: Name of the AccessApprovalServiceAccount to retrieve.

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approva.description: Gets an approval request. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist.

required.description: The name of the approval request to retrieve. Format: "{projects|folders|organizations}/{id}/approvalRequests/{approval_

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.list, iterate response["approvalRequests"][], extract item["name"] → fill {approvalRequestId}

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approva.description: Dismisses a request. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest. NOTE: When a request is dismissed, it is considered ignored. Dismissing a request does not prevent access granted by other Access Approval req

required.description: Name of the ApprovalRequest to dismiss.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.list, iterate response["approvalRequests"][], extract item["name"] → fill {approvalRequestId}

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approva.description: Invalidates an existing ApprovalRequest. Returns the updated ApprovalRequest. NOTE: This action revokes Google access based on this approval request. If the resource has other active approvals, access

required.description: Name of the ApprovalRequest to invalidate.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.list, iterate response["approvalRequests"][], extract item["name"] → fill {approvalRequestId}

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approva.description: Approves a request and returns the updated ApprovalRequest. Returns NOT_FOUND if the request does not exist. Returns FAILED_PRECONDITION if the request exists but is not in a pending state.

required.description: Name of the approval request to approve.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approvalRequests.list, iterate response["approvalRequests"][], extract item["name"] → fill {approvalRequestId}

gcp.accessapproval.organizations.approva.description: Lists approval requests associated with a project, folder, or organization. Approval requests can be filtered by state (pending, active, dismissed). The order is reverse chronological.

required.description: The parent resource. This may be "projects/{project}", "folders/{folder}", or "organizations/{organization}".

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()
